name: Fruit Cheddar Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Sift together the dry ingredients.
3. Cut in the butter until the mixture resembles coarse peas.
4. Add the cheese and toss lightly.
5. Add the eggs and blend well.
6. Chill one quarter of the dough.
7. Press the remaining dough into the bottom and sides of an ungreased 15-1/2 x 10-1/2 x 1-1/2-inch jelly roll pan.
8. Spread half the dough with peach preserves and the other half with strawberry preserves.
9. Roll the chilled dough on a lightly floured surface to 1/4-inch thick.
10. Cut the dough into 1/2-inch strips.
11. Place the strips diagonally across the top of the preserves, making a lattice pattern.
12. Press the ends of the dough against the side dough to seal.
13. Bake in the preheated oven for 35 minutes or until lightly browned.
14. Cool before cutting into 2 x 3-inch bars.
